KB-001.title: Resetting your password
KB-001.content: To reset your password, click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. An email with a reset link will be sent to your registered email address.

KB-002.title: Contacting support
KB-002.content: You can reach out to our support team via email at support@example.com or by calling 1-800-555-0199 during business hours.

KB-003.title: Upgrading to Premium
KB-003.content: To upgrade your account tier to Premium, navigate to the Billing section of your dashboard and select 'Upgrade Plan'.

KB-004.title: Data Privacy Policy
KB-004.content: We do not share your customer data with third parties. All database records are strictly confidential and encrypted at rest.

KB-005.title: System Alerts and Status
KB-005.content: Check the system status page for ongoing outages. If you suspect a security issue, escalate to admin immediately.
